# Wheel-Thrown Vessels Collection

Each vessel in this series is individually shaped on a momentum potter's wheel using local dark stoneware clay.

## Collection Highlights

- **Tenmoku Moon Vases**: High-fired iron glazes creating deep amber oil-spot crystal fields.
- **Shino Tea Bowls**: Soft feldspathic glaze with carbon-trap snowfall patterns.

Learn how to maintain these pieces in our [Ceramics Care Guide](../care-guide.md) or return to the [Studio Homepage](../index.md).
